◎简　　介  

　　A sinister bet between two foes sends Dicky St. Jon into action to save failing Magnolia Greyhound Park. While his crew revives the track for a winner-take-all race, used car lot owner Mak Hoffstadt looks for a way to guarantee a victory, no matter the cost.
introduction: A sinister bet between two foes sends Dicky St. Jon into action to save failing Magnolia Greyhound Park. While his crew revives the track for a winner-take-all race, used car lot owner Mak Hoffstadt looks for a way to guarantee a victory, no matter the cost.
